title: Victor Harbor Holiday Park
description: Laid-back holiday park offering unfussy cabins and chalets, plus BBQs & an outdoor pool.
address: 19 Bay Rd, Victor Harbor SA 5211, Australia
hotelDescription:
This relaxed holiday park on the Fleurieu Peninsula is 4 minutes' walk from the Inman River, 7 minutes from the oceanfront Kent Reserve and 2 km from the Victor Harbor Horse Drawn Tram to Granite Island.
 The simple chalets and 2-bedroom cabins offer en suite bathrooms, and kitchenettes or kitchens, plus free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and DVD players; some have bunk beds or pull-out sofas, while others offer additional TVs.
 Amenities include free parking, an outdoor pool, a playground and a game room, as well as gas BBQs and a shop selling snacks. The park also has caravan pitches.

title: NRMA Victor Harbor Beachfront Holiday Park
address: 114 Victoria St, Victor Harbor SA 5211, Australia

title: Quality Inn Near Walden Galleria Mall
description: Roadside property with basic quarters & an indoor pool, plus free WiFi, hot breakfast & parking.
hotelDescription:
Located just off I-190 and near I-90, this low-rise hotel is 4.5 miles from the HSBC Center and 4.2 miles from the Walden Galleria Mall.
 The low-key accommodations come with free WiFi and have private bathrooms with showers, as well as flat-screen TVs, coffeemakers and minifridges. Suites add separate living space, pull-out sofas and jetted tubs.
 Freebies include a complimentary hot breakfast buffet, access to computers in the business center, 24-hour coffee, and outdoor parking for cars, buses and RVs. There's also an indoor heated pool with lounge chairs, an exercise room and meeting rooms.

hotelAds.title: Quality Inn Near Walden Galleria Mall
